english translation text:
Ali (a.s.) used to cry and say at the grave of Muhammad (s.a.w.)
Rokay Kehte They Yeh Turbat Pay Muhammad (s.a.w.) Ki Ali (a.s.)

Ali (a.s. Is Alive While Your Zahra (s.a.) Is No More
Haae Zindah Hai Ali (a.s.) Aap Ki Zahra (s.a.) Nah Rahi

urdu transliteration text: meri aankhon mein hai kyun aaj yeh pani sun lau, mere aaqa mere ashqo ki kahani sun lo
english translation text: Why Are My Eyes Full Of Water? My Master, Listen To The Story Of My Tears

urdu transliteration text:
hoke sharminda yahi kehti hai ashqo ki ladi
haae zindah hai Ali (as) aap ki Zahra (sa) nah rahi
english translation text: Shyly, The Tears Say, Ali (a.s.) Is Alive While Your Zahra (s.a.) Is No More

urdu transliteration text:
Fatima (sa) ne jo ebadaat se abad  rakha
usi hujray mein bukaa karta hai ab sannaata
english translation text: What Fatima kept alive through her worship, That silence cries in Her place now..

urdu transliteration text:
reh gayi hai wahan tasbeeh faqat Zahra (sa) ki
haae zindah hai Ali (as) aap ki Zahra (sa) nah rahi
english translation text: Zahra’s Tasbeeh Is Still There,Ali (a.s.) Is Alive While Your Zahra (s.a.) Is No More

urdu transliteration text:
kabhi Zainab (sa) ki duhaai kahin kulsoom (sa) ke bain
peet te sir hain Hasan (as) aur kabhi mazloom Hussain (as)
english translation text: Sometimes in Zainab’s replies or in Kulsoom’s talks, They beat the head of Hasan (a.s.) and sometimes the oppressed Hussain (a.s.)

urdu transliteration text:
mujh se bachon ki yeh haalat nahi dekhi jati
haae zindah hai Ali (as) aap ki Zahra (sa) nah rahi
english translation text: I cannot see the children of Fatima in this state! Ali (a.s.) is alive while your Zahra (s.a.) is no more

urdu transliteration text:
jab se bachon naay sunaya mujhe darbaar ka haal
aaj taq hon unhi baton ko aziat se nidhaal
english translation text: Since my children told me the state of the court, Those memories keep them fatigued even today

urdu transliteration text:
bharay darbaar mein Zahra (sa) ko kaha hai jhooti
haae zindah hai Ali (as) aap ki Zahra (sa) nah rahi
english translation text: Zahra (s.a.) has been called a liar in court full of people. Ali (a.s.) is alive while your Zahra (s.a.) is no more

urdu transliteration text:
kash Zahra (sa) ne yeh sadme nah uthaye hotay
kash yeh dard maray hissay mein aeye hotay
english translation text: I wish Zahra had not borne such atrocities. I wish these pains would have come my way

urdu transliteration text:
kash Zahra (sa) ki jagah jaan chali jati meri
haae zindah hai Ali (as) aap ki Zahra (sa) nah rahi
english translation text: I wish my life was taken instead of Zahra’s (s.a.). Ali (a.s.) is alive while your Zahra (s.a.) is no more

urdu transliteration text: darr tha mismaar nah kar dein kahin Qabar Zahra (sa) iss liye aap ke pehlu mein nahi dafnaya
english translation text: The house was destroyed, thankfully not her grave. That is why I didn’t bury her near you Muhammad (s.a.w.)

urdu transliteration text:
mere sarkar samajh lena yeh majaboori meri
haae zindah hai Ali (as) aap ki Zahra (sa) nah rahi
english translation text: My master, understand my situation. Ali (a.s.) is alive while your Zahra (s.a.) is no more

urdu transliteration text:
qabar se aayi jo sarkar risaalat (saw)!ki sada
ab nah duhrana yeh jumla maray mazloom Ali (as)
english translation text: A sound came from the Prophet’s (s.a.w) grave “Now don’t repeat this my oppressed Ali (a.s.)”

urdu transliteration text: haae zindah hai Ali (as) aap ki Zahra (sa) nah rahi
english translation text: Ali (a.s.) Is Alive While You Zahra (s.a.) Is No More
Thanks to the Lord of Zahra (s.a.)
